welcome.title: Welcome to Braid
welcome.subtitle: Your AI-powered Git workspace
welcome.description: Braid combines Claude AI with Git worktrees so you can run multiple coding agents in parallel — each on its own branch.

doctor.title: Environment Check
doctor.subtitle: Making sure your tools are ready

project.title: Add Your First Project
project.subtitle: Open a local Git repo or clone one from GitHub

ghAuth.title: Sign in to GitHub
ghAuth.instruction: Enter this code on GitHub to connect your account.

available.title: Update Available
available.body: Braid v{{version}} is ready to download.

ready.title: Update Ready
ready.body: Braid v{{version}} has been downloaded. Restart to apply the update.

error.title: Update Failed
error.body: Something went wrong while checking for updates.

sidebar.title: Your Projects
sidebar.description: Your projects and worktrees live here. Each worktree is an isolated branch you can work on simultaneously.

addWorktree.title: Create a Worktree
addWorktree.description: Create a new worktree to start working on a branch. Each worktree is a fully isolated copy of your repo.

chatPanel.title: Chat with Claude
chatPanel.description: Chat with Claude to write code, fix bugs, and build features. Use @ to mention files and / for slash commands.

sessionTabs.title: Session & File Tabs
sessionTabs.description: Run multiple chat sessions per worktree. Open files as editor tabs alongside your chats.

rightPanel.title: Files, Changes & Checks
rightPanel.description: Browse your project files, view git changes, and monitor CI status — all in one panel.

terminal.title: Integrated Terminal
terminal.description: Run commands, view logs, and execute scripts without leaving the app.

missionControl.title: Mission Control
missionControl.description: See all your worktrees at a glance. Track running sessions, PRs, and CI status across your entire project.

intro.title: Simulator Preview
intro.description: Preview and control iOS & Android simulators directly in Braid. Tap, swipe, and type on the live device screen.

devices.title: Your Devices
devices.description: This is where your available simulators appear. Boot a device to power it on, then connect to start streaming.

connect.title: Boot & Connect
connect.description: Tap Boot to start a device, then Connect to stream its screen. You can also link it to your chat so Claude can see the UI.

offline.banner: You're offline - some features are unavailable
